name: Lara WhatsApp Single Callback (Verify GET + Callback POST) - n8n Cloud 2.13.3

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ event_id: $json.event_id, wa_id: $json.wa_id, telefone: $json.telefone, message_text: $json.message_text, tenant_id: $json.tenant_id || $env.LARA_TENANT_ID || "default", jurisdicao: $json.jurisdicao || "BR", canal: $json.canal || "WHATSAPP", received_at: $json.received_at, payload: Object.assign({}, $json.payload || {}, { phone_number_id: $json.phone_number_id || $env.WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID || "" }) }) }}
={{ ({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", recipient_type: "individual", to: $json.to, type: "text", text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.text } }) }}
={{ ({ event_id: $json.event_id, message_id: $json.message_id, wa_id: $json.wa_id, status: $json.status, timestamp: $json.timestamp, payload: $json.payload || {} }) }}
